principle: DAG/ready-set scheduling. Circled numbers are node IDs, not a serial execution order.

13.name: stage1-execution-plan-ingest
13.role: Validate and copy Stage1 node-13 execution-plan artifacts into the Stage2 workspace.

14.name: simulator-skill-registry
14.role: Inventory available simulator skills from BENCHCLAW_ROOT/simulatorCards and normalize callable interfaces.

15.name: real-image-acquisition
15.role: Collect real images and target annotation requirements without treating LLM descriptions as GT.

16.name: existing-benchmark-acquisition
16.role: Collect existing benchmark samples, labels, licenses, splits, and expected extra annotation needs.

17.name: simulator-multimodal-gt-acquisition
17.role: Run simulator skills to collect multimodal observations, trajectories, and privileged simulator GT.

forbidden_interpretations: Do not run 13->14->15->16->17 as a serial chain.
Do not make node 15 or 16 depend on node 14.
Do not make node 17 depend on node 15 or 16.
Do not add a merge node unless the user explicitly asks for one.
